name: TwistGold Necklace
description:
TwistGold Necklace is the statement piece your collection is missing. Hand-twisted cable chain with a solid weight that drapes beautifully, precious metal options that suit every skin tone, and a clasp that's secure without being fiddly.

  • 14K solid gold or sterling silver
  • Hand-twisted cable chain
  • Adjustable length: 16-20 inches
  • Solid lobster claw clasp
  • Engraving available

Worn alone or layered — unmistakably elegant.
warranty:
This product includes a 1-year limited manufacturer warranty covering hardware defects and component failures under normal use, from the date of purchase.

We will repair or replace defective units at no cost during the warranty period. Retain your order confirmation as proof of purchase, and contact support with your order number to start a claim.

reviews.name: Sofia R.
reviews.text: Added a special message. The engraving is small and elegant. Feels personal without being overdone.
reviews.title: Engraving service is seamless

reviews.name: Evelyn M.
reviews.text: At this price point, I was skeptical. Certificate of authenticity confirms it's solid 14K. Happy with the purchase.
reviews.title: Good value solid gold

reviews.name: Natalie P.
reviews.text: Rose gold flatters my skin tone perfectly. Chain is exactly the right weight — not too delicate, not too chunky.
reviews.title: Rose gold is stunning

reviews.name: Grace T.
reviews.text: Added engraving with our anniversary date. She cried when she opened it. Quality is impeccable. Worth every cent.
reviews.title: Purchased as an anniversary gift

reviews.name: Vivian K.
reviews.text: Dainty enough to wear every day, substantial enough to feel like real jewelry. The twist pattern catches light beautifully.
reviews.title: The perfect everyday necklace
